reviews.comment:
Not a great service on my moving experience for the first time for moving 4 pieces and so overly expensive. They sent unexperienced  staff that did more of arguing than work like Abbott & Costello and then wanted a tip!
Forget about it .
Terrible , they could not even build a mattress frame up without screws which were found after they left. They had swept  off to the side and said  “ we can’t it missing screws “  to avoid what they could not do.
Just awful waste of money and totally ineptitude of service or experience.
Stay away ! A rip off .

reviewReply.comment:
Thanks for your feedback!!. We’re sorry to hear that working on your move for over 2hrs for $460 felt ‘overly expensive’. Our pricing reflects the cost of professional labor, transportation, and ensuring your belongings are handled with care.

As for the mattress frame, our team does their best to assemble furniture when all necessary parts are available. We wish we had known the screws were there at the time!!

We appreciate your your input and hope your furniture  experiences are smoother.

reviews.comment:
I highly recommend Rapid Panda for anyone looking for a quality moving experience. Andy is a professional and runs a very tight ship. I have used this company more than once, and they are always on time, offer the highest quality service, and are very fair with their pricing.  Andy’s workers were of a quality and expertise that is rarely found in the moving industry, Andy and his team will treat your property like its is their own-  absolutely the best moving experience!.
Mike

reviewReply.comment: Thanks for being a repeat customer and being such a great guy all around. We love working for people like you. Thanks for choosing us 🙏.

reviews.comment: This company was by far the MOST HONEST guys I’ve ever come across. I Zelled their payment twice without realizing it and kept going with my day. Later on that day I got a phone call from Andy to let me know that I had paid double and proceeded to return the extra money. You don’t see this level of honesty anymore. Definitely RAPID PANDA RECOMMENDED!!!

reviews.name: accounts/113490489123284632438/locations/2655804103012623261/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURScXQyR2pBRRAB

reviews.comment: I want to share with you all how amazing this team is ! A little late post though as I want to take time to share this experience and write it down .. We planned our move 2 months earlier and we booked a moving company who was supposed to show on the day of my move at 8am. All small things were packed waiting for the movers to pack and move the big stuffs … My husband is reaching out to the company we had booked .. they said they are on the way and we wait every 30 minutes we call and kept checking … but they never showed up until 11.. I quickly searched in google to see movers available in 33155 zip code and Rapid Panda showed up . Andy picked up and patiently listened to my conversation as explained above 👆I did not expect that they would be able to accept a last minute request but surprisingly Andy mentioned Can you let me know the stuffs you have in place and We are here to help you. All I would need 2 hours of time to coordinate the crew and they will be coming to your location by 12 ! Due to my bitter experience that morning with the other team I kept checking with Andy in intervals and he was so kind to keep me updated ! By 1 the 2 men showed up fully functional… Those two are so amazing they were so quick , very detail oriented and accomplished all that I requested and finally saved my day ! I felt Andy like a god that day ! Best movers I would recommend who can be relied upon and help the ones in need

reviewReply.comment: Thanks 🙏 for your great review. Thanks for trusting us and it was our honor to help you.

I highly recommend Rapid Panda Movers for anyone in need of a reliable and efficient moving company. 5 stars! Speak with Andy!
